expectations.text: HTML report file (report.html) was generated
expectations.evidence: report.html exists with meaningful content, Korean-language quality audit report.

expectations.text: CSV report file (report.csv) was generated
expectations.evidence: report.csv exists with 70 rows covering accessibility (A-01 to A-33, SH-01 to SH-07), SEO (SEO-01 to SEO-11), and Web Performance (WP-01 to WP-18).

expectations.text: Report contains accessibility section (Section A)
expectations.evidence: HTML report has section header 'A. 접근성 (KWCAG2.2 33항목 + 시맨틱 HTML 7항목)' with all accessibility items listed.

expectations.text: Report contains SEO and Web Performance section (Section B)
expectations.evidence: CSV contains SEO section (SEO-01 to SEO-11) and Web Performance section (WP-01 to WP-18). HTML report includes both sections.

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
expectations.evidence: CSV contains items A-01 through A-33, each with a result (✅/❌/⚠️/➖). All 33 KWCAG items are present and evaluated.

expectations.text: All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: CSV contains SEO-01 through SEO-11, each with a result (✅/❌/⚠️).

expectations.text: All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: CSV contains WP-01 through WP-18, each with a result (✅/❌/⚠️/➖).

expectations.text: Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references
expectations.evidence: Failed items include references like 'index.html:30', 'Card.tsx:24-29', 'dashboard.tsx:29-36', 'Card.tsx:27', 'dashboard.tsx:45-46', 'index.html:37-44', 'dashboard.tsx:12-13'.

expectations.text: Fix guide section exists with concrete code-level recommendations
expectations.evidence: CSV has a '수정 가이드' column with specific code fixes. HTML report includes a fix guide section with concrete code recommendations.

expectations.text: Report is written in Korean
expectations.evidence: Report is primarily in Korean. Title: '웹 품질 종합 감사 리포트', sections in Korean, all item descriptions and fix guides in Korean.

expectations.text: HTML report file (report.html) was generated

expectations.text: CSV report file (report.csv) was generated
expectations.evidence: report.csv exists with 21 rows of issue data across Accessibility, SEO, Performance, and Security categories.

expectations.text: Report contains accessibility section (Section A)
expectations.evidence: Report does not have a structured 'Section A' for accessibility. It has an 'Accessibility' category with 6 ad-hoc issues, not a systematic KWCAG2.2 checklist.

expectations.text: Report contains SEO and Web Performance section (Section B)
expectations.evidence: Report has separate SEO (5 issues) and Performance (7 issues) categories but not a structured Section B with SEO-01~11 and WP-01~18 format.

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
expectations.evidence: Only 6 accessibility issues are listed ad-hoc. No structured 33-item KWCAG2.2 checklist.

expectations.text: All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: Only 5 SEO issues listed (S1-S5) using custom IDs, not the standard SEO-01~11 format.

expectations.text: All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: Only 7 performance issues listed (P1-P7) using custom IDs, not the standard WP-01~18 format.

expectations.text: Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references
expectations.evidence: Issues include file/line references: 'index.html line 30', 'dashboard.tsx lines 29-36', 'Card.tsx line 27', 'Card.tsx line 29', 'index.html line 42', etc.

expectations.text: Fix guide section exists with concrete code-level recommendations
expectations.evidence: Each issue has a Recommendation column with specific code-level fixes like 'Add aria-label to each icon button', 'Use a <button> element or add role="button"', etc.

expectations.text: Report is written in Korean
expectations.evidence: Report is written entirely in English. Title: 'Web Quality Review Report'. All descriptions and recommendations in English.
